sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107055" key="u(pekde/xomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπεκ-δέχομαι</orth>, <sense id="n107055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">have under oneself,</tr_> of a cow, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μαστῷ πόρτιν ὑ.,</foreign> of a calf at the udder, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.722</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip. Sid.).</sense> </entryFree>
